case_title: DAVID GALLAHER VS. DANIEL BRAUNSTEIN --FILED PURSUANT TO LITITGANTS REQUEST.--

COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GALLAHER, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-23-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-23-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF DAVID GALLAHERIS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL BRAUNSTEIN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GALLAHER, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAUNSTEIN, DANIEL $6,876.64 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,026.64, FOR NON-PAYMENT OF RENT SEPTEMBER THROUGH DECEMBER 2019.
